text:
Created attachment 256467
Changed distinfo file

Regarding a "bug" in the java/eclipse version 4.34 build on FreeBSD/aarch64 - I made a fix in a github repository - and as a result, this changed the distinfo data a bit.  It should work for amd64 and aarch64 now :-)

Attached the distinfo file :-)  Please commit it.

Cheers, Norbert
